description: Address semantic review findings: remove debug endpoint, add image URL validation, add UploadThing auth middleware, optimize rank query, remove production console.log statements
steps: Remove src/app/api/debug/route.ts - it exposes internal DB records
Add image URL validation in src/app/api/profile/route.ts - only allow URLs starting with https://utfs.io/, https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/, or https://res.cloudinary.com/
Add .middleware() auth check to the avatar endpoint in src/app/api/uploadthing/core.ts
Optimize rank query in src/app/api/dashboard/stats/route.ts - replace in-memory groupBy with a single COUNT query using db.$queryRaw
Remove or gate console.log statements in src/app/api/teacher/tests/route.ts behind process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development'
acceptance_criteria: Profile PATCH rejects image URLs not from allowed domains
Rank computation uses efficient SQL instead of loading all users
Production console.log statements are removed or gated behind development mode
npm run build succeeds without errors
verification: Run npm run build and confirm no TypeScript errors
